title: amelanchier canadensis var. fernaldii
intro: Amelanchier canadensis var. fernaldii, also known as Fernald's serviceberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The Fernald's serviceberry has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, and topical applications like salves and creams for skin issues.
